claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: The homepage does not contain a link to the pricing page, making it impossible to access in two clicks.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: "Join us for a webinar featuring Abdullah Haydar, Director of Engineering at LinkedIn..."

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Glean goes from insight to action. Connect all your apps to Glean. Glean understands your company’s knowledge to automate work.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: "Personalized, permissions-aware access to company data Glean analyzes content, activity, and people to understand how you work. All data permissions are inherited and strictly enforced, so users only see what they’re allowed to."
